hero.title: Events that move.
hero.subtitle: We create unforgettable experiences — from sunrise silent discos to tailor-made weddings and corporate events.

marquee.items: SUNRISE DISCO · SILENT DISCO RUN · EVENT PLANNING · WEDDINGS · CORPORATE EVENTS · FESTIVALS ·

services.title: Experiences that stay with you
services.subtitle: From our own event formats to custom event planning — we bring energy to every project.
services.own_events_desc: Sunrise Silent Disco Run, Sunrise Beach Disco and more — our own formats move people.
services.planning_desc: Weddings, corporate events, private celebrations — we plan and create your perfect event.
services.creative_desc: Unique ideas and concepts that make your event stand out from the crowd.

silent_disco.title: Sunrise Silent Disco Run
silent_disco.description: Running at sunrise, connected through music — everyone in their own rhythm. A shared experience that unites energy, movement and music.

beach_disco.title: Sunrise Beach Disco
beach_disco.description: Dancing on the beach as the sun rises. Barefoot in the sand, surrounded by beats and good vibes — the perfect start to the day.

hero.title: Who we are
hero.subtitle: We are Vayve — an event agency with passion for unforgettable moments.

mission.title: Creating events that move people and moments that last.
mission.text: Vayve stands for energy, creativity and passion. We believe events can be more than just occasions — they can connect, inspire and move people.
mission.vision_text: The go-to destination for unforgettable event experiences.

passion.title: Passion
passion.description: We are passionate about what we do. Every event is a matter of the heart.

creativity.title: Creativity
creativity.description: Every event is unique. We think differently, boldly and surprisingly.

reliability.title: Reliability
reliability.description: We deliver on our promises. You can count on us.

energy.title: Energy
energy.description: We bring momentum to every project. Standing still is not an option.

hero.title: What we do
hero.subtitle: From our own event formats to complete event planning — we bring your vision to life.

silent_disco.title: Sunrise Silent Disco Run
silent_disco.description: A unique running event at sunrise. Every participant wears wireless headphones and runs to their own rhythm — connected through music, energy and the rising sun. An experience you have to feel.

beach_disco.title: Sunrise Beach Disco
beach_disco.description: Dancing on the beach, barefoot in the sand, as the sun rises over the horizon. DJs, good vibes and a community starting the day together. No alcohol, pure energy.

weddings.title: Weddings
weddings.description: Your most important day deserves perfect planning. From the venue to the last dance — we take care of every detail.

corporate.title: Corporate Events
corporate.description: Company celebrations, team building, product launches — professionally planned with that special Vayve touch.

private.title: Private Celebrations
private.description: Birthdays, anniversaries, special occasions — we turn your celebration into an unforgettable experience.

steps.title: Consultation
steps.description: We listen, understand your vision and develop initial ideas.

steps.title: Concept
steps.description: We create a tailor-made concept with all the details.

steps.title: Planning
steps.description: From venues to catering — we coordinate all aspects.

steps.title: Execution
steps.description: On event day, we're on site ensuring everything runs smoothly.

hero.title: Gallery
hero.subtitle: Our events in pictures — moments that move.

hero.title: Let's talk
hero.subtitle: Got an idea? We'll turn it into an experience.
